description: The customizable newsletter style template is the perfect way to share information with employees to increase engagement and awareness of best practices and policies. This customizable template allows employers to highlight tips, share stories,  get feedback, and ways to connect. This template is part of our Human Resources Collection. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
